title: nephrodium dimorphum
intro: Nephrodium dimorphum, also known as the Maidenhair Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium dimorphum include soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine as a poultice or applied topically to wounds.
